info.description: Authentication, contacts, health, and user settings endpoints.
info.title: AE SaaS Base API

Validate an email verification token to check if it's valid and not expired

Authenticate user with username/email and password
Reset user password with reset token

get.description: Returns the current password security requirements including minimum length and character requirements
Verify user email address with verification token

parameters.description: Filter by contact type (business, personal, etc)
parameters.name: type

Public endpoint to submit a contact form (no authentication required)

delete.description: Unsubscribe an email address from the newsletter

get.description: Get a specific contact by ID

put.description: Update an existing contact by ID

delete.description: Soft delete a contact by ID

get.description: Check the health status of the API and database
Get settings for the authenticated user (creates default if not found)

post.description: Reset user settings to default values
